prompting.responds_best_to: Narrow, single-purpose prompts with an explicit output format.
prompting.avoid: Multi-part or open-ended tasks — decompose them first.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Be concise and follow the requested output format exactly.

quirks: Fast and cheap; ideal for fanning out atomic subtasks
Degrades when reasoning must be chained — keep each call atomic

handoff.output_format_instruction: Demand strict, machine-parseable output (JSON or fixed labels) and supply one example.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Verify completeness and that it did not oversimplify; re-route to Sonnet if real reasoning was required.
